/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/telemetry_hott_unittest.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/telemetry_hott_unittest.dir/telemetry_hott_unittest.cc.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_hott_unittest.dir/__/__/main/telemetry/hott.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_hott_unittest.dir/__/__/main/common/gps_conversion.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_hott_unittest.dir/__/__/main/common/string_light.c.o CMakeFiles/telemetry_hott_unittest.dir/telemetry_hott_unittest_gen/settings_generated.c.o -o telemetry_hott_unittest  ../../../lib/libgtest_main.a ../../../lib/libgtest.a
